name: Team Katie
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Thanks for an incredible September!

Because of your support, we blew our $10,000 fundraising goal out of the water!

Katie has received endorsements from prominent PA leaders like Governor Tom Wolf and Governor Ed Rendell & over a dozen mayors in towns big and small

Thank you, thank you for being a part of this incredible grassroots movement

With your help, we can and will send Katie to the Senate next November!

Take the next step: Follow Katie on Facebook!

https://www.facebook.com/katiemcgintypa?fref=ts

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-4494041474005991424/-500160142893907968.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Thank you
body:
# [](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb253b/43f17890/56ebf65e/621fee32/2982629959/VEsH/ "http://berniesanders.com")
Brothers and Sisters -
Thank you VERY much for your financial support for our campaign.
When we talk about a "political revolution," we are not just talking about tinkering around the edges of American society. We are talking about transforming our country in many respects -- the economy, health care, education, the environment, criminal justice, immigration and many other areas.
But what we are also talking about is transforming our corrupt campaign finance system -- a system which, as a result of the disastrous Citizens United Supreme Court decision, now allows millionaires and billionaires to buy elections and undermine the very foundations of American democracy.
What we have done together so far in this campaign is not only extraordinary and unprecedented, it is transforming American politics. What we have shown is that we can raise over $40 million dollars without having a Super PAC. What we have shown is that we can raise an amount of money which makes us financially competitive by securing 1.3 million contributions from, unbelievably, 650,000 Americans. What we have shown is that we can run a successful campaign without having to depend upon donations from the wealthy and the powerful, and that we can do it with an average campaign contribution of only $30.
Our political system is corrupt. Big Money controls much of what happens.
Together, you and I are changing that.
Thank you again for your support.
Best,
Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb253b/43f17890/56ebf65e/621fee33/2982629959/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb253b/43f17890/56ebf65e/621fee30/2982629959/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb253b/43f17890/56ebf65e/621fee31/2982629959/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Our political revolution is built by a massive volunteer organization -- [tell us how you can help our campaign](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb253b/43f17890/56ebf65e/621fee3e/2982629959/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/work?source=email_footer").

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Suit of armor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Before I type another sentence, I want to give you a heartfelt thank you.

Your contributions not only helped my campaign hit its quarterly goals--they helped fend off attacks from Republicans and their loyal, deep-pocketed benefactors like Karl Rove and the Koch Brothers.

In a way, your support has been a suit of armor.

It's easy to become disillusioned with the negativity that runs rampant during campaigning. However, supporters like you serve as a constant reminder of the number one reason I'm willing to come under attack--so our vulnerable economy, environment, and social safety net don't have to.

We're still more than a year away from Election Day, but with your ironclad backing, I feel ready to take on my primary opponent, Republicans, and most importantly, win this Senate seat.

Forever grateful,

Patrick Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2157/738133e4/3aa66f47/7f8f798c/855080483/VEsH/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2157/738133e4/3aa66f47/7f8f798d/855080483/VEsE/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2157/738133e4/3aa66f47/7f8f798e/855080483/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: the time for Congressional action is now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Dear Friend, On Wednesday, I joined with Maryland Attorney General Brian Frosh, law enforcement officials, researchers from Johns Hopkins University, and gun safety activists to commemorate the two-year anniversary of Maryland's historic Firearm Safety Act of 2013 -- a law that requires a permit in order to purchase a handgun. We also stood together to call for further action to protect our communities from the toll of gun violence, and to share the research about how common sense gun laws like Maryland's can save lives.

Tragically, not 24 hours later, we have the unbearable news of another mass shooting, this time in Oregon.

This massacre adds to the awful daily death toll from senseless gun violence on our streets and in our neighborhoods, in Maryland and around the country. As President Obama said yesterday, it is not enough to simply offer our thoughts and prayers. We must remember all the victims, their families, and their communities by demanding action to end senseless violence in our country.

Please, take a minute to watch President Obama's address about yesterday's tragedy. [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fd7/70cdc2ba/47a96aff/3962114/2968836814/VEsH/ "https://www.whitehouse.gov/blog/2015/10/01/watch-president-obamas-statement-shooting-oregon?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em100215&source=em100215") If gun violence were a disease, we would have all hands on deck to find a cure. Yet with this epidemic, nothing is being done.

We know there are ways to prevent mass shootings and curb gun violence. There are over 90 gun safety bills sitting in Congress that are being blocked by Republicans who kowtow to the NRA and the gun lobby. Common sense laws, like ones passed right here in Maryland and my Handgun Purchaser Licensing Act, can actually reduce gun violence, but Congress refuses to act.

We cannot allow the NRA and Republicans to stop action. I join with President Obama's call for change. We must pass legislation and prevent more tragedies like this from happening.

I hope you will join me in this cause and make your voices heard as well.

**[Please, contact your legislators today. Call them, write them, send them an email, and tell them to take action to end the scourge of gun violence.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fd7/70cdc2ba/47a96aff/396212c/2968836814/VEsE/ "http://act.commoncause.org/site/PageServer?pagename=sunlight_advocacy_list_page&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+contact+your+legislators+today+Ca&utm_campaign=em100215&source=em100215")**

Thank you, Chris
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fd7/70cdc2ba/47a96aff/3962123/2968836814/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em100215&source=em100215") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
